calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-09-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-09-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Mitchell, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Appearance by plaintiffs N.R. Patel and Kriss Miranda.

No appearance by defendants Kenneth Schneller and Charity Everett

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 106-6th Street, Unit 506, San Francisco, CA. 94112.
Past due rent - 3045.00
Costs - 240.00
Total Judgment - 3285.00
Lease agreement is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiffs N.R. Patel and K. Miranda are present and in Pro Per.
Defendant Kenneth Schneller IS NOT present.
The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of JUL-09-2012 remains on calendar.
